item.title: 要抢 Windows 用户？更便宜的 MacBook 本周见
item.guid: 要抢-Windows-用户？更便宜的-MacBook-本周见
item.description:
This week, Apple is expected to release several new products, with the new entry-level MacBook and the new iPhone 17e drawing significant attention. 本周，苹果预计将会发布多款全新产品，其中全新的入门级 MacBook 以及新的 iPhone 17e 备受瞩目。

The biggest highlights of the new MacBook are its "lower starting price" + the use of the same processor as the iPhone (expected to be the A18 Pro), and it is expected to have a screen size under 13 inches and feature a colorful casing design. 新款 MacBook 最大的亮点就是「起售价格更低」+采用 iPhone 同款处理器（预计为 A18 Pro），并且有望屏幕尺寸控制在 13 英寸以下，采用多彩的外壳设计。

According to Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman, Apple internally believes that the new entry-level MacBook will largely attract users switching from Windows or Chromebook camps to macOS, and may even prompt iPhone users without a computer to buy their first Mac. 据彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 报道，苹果内部认为新的入门款 MacBook 将会大量吸引从 Windows 或 Chromebook 阵营转向 macOS 的用户，甚至可能促使没有电脑的 iPhone 用户买下他们的第一台 Mac。

Gurman also pointed out that Apple is reminding Apple Store employees to extend their working hours (similar to the iPhone launch in September), and Apple Stores will also set up a dedicated counter for new products. 并且 Gurman 还指出，苹果正在提醒 Apple Store 的员工需要延长工作时间（与 9 月发布 iPhone 的时候类似），Apple Store 还将设置一个专门用于摆放新产品的柜台。

The iPhone 17e, in addition to upgrading to the same A19 chip as the iPhone 17 and adding MagSafe magnetic charging, is also planned to switch to Apple's next-generation self-developed cellular and wireless chips. 而 iPhone 17e 除了升级至 iPhone 17 同款 A19 芯片，并补上 MagSafe 磁吸功能。同时，还计划换用苹果更新一代的自研蜂窝网络与无线芯片。

Generated by Gemini

In last night's "Power On" column, Gurman further analyzed the touch-screen MacBook Pro expected to be released by the end of this year. 在昨晚的《Power On》专栏上，Gurman 还进一步分析了预计今年年底上市的触控版 MacBook Pro。

Gurman stated that Apple will not launch a "MacBook-iPad fusion" product for some time. In fact, the company prefers customers to buy both an iPad and a Mac, and will increasingly bundle these two product lines in marketing in the future. Gurman 表示，苹果将在一段时间内都不会推出一款「MacBook 融 iPad」的产品，事实上这家公司更希望顾客同时购买 iPad 和 Mac，未来还会越来越多地将这两条产品线捆绑营销。

Therefore, the new MacBook Pro with a touch screen will still primarily rely on "keyboard + trackpad" operation, with the touch screen acting more as an auxiliary function. 因此新款带触控屏幕的 MacBook Pro 依然以「键盘+触控板」的操作为主，而触控屏幕更像是辅助功能。

The report also re-mentioned a foldable iPad: it would have a screen size similar to a MacBook but would retain the portability expected of an iPad, not becoming a true 2-in-1 product, and would still run iPadOS. 报道还重新提及了可折叠的 iPad：拥有 MacBook 类似的屏幕尺寸大小，但依然保持 iPad 该有的便携，不会成为一款真正的二合一产品，依然跑的 iPadOS。

Additionally, Apple plans to replace the existing Core ML with a new Core AI framework at this year's Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) and deeply integrate Google's Gemini large model into the next-generation system. 另外，苹果还计划在今年的全球开发者大会（WWDC）上以全新 Core AI 框架取代原有的 Core ML，并在新一代系统中深度集成谷歌 Gemini 大模型。

As a core project, the new Siri, internally codenamed "Campo," will deeply integrate Google's Gemini large model to enhance its capabilities in chat interaction, personal data invocation, and cross-application control. 作为核心项目，内部代号为「Campo」的全新 Siri 将深度集成谷歌的 Gemini 大模型，从而提升其在聊天交互、调用个人数据以及跨应用控制方面的能力。

Sources say that the naming transition from "Machine Learning (ML)" to "Artificial Intelligence (AI)" aims to align with the current industry context. The core function of this framework is to help developers more conveniently integrate external third-party AI models into their applications. 消息人士称，从「机器学习（ML）」向「人工智能（AI）」的命名转换旨在顺应当下行业语境，该框架的核心功能是协助开发者更便捷地将外部第三方 AI 模型接入其应用程序。

item.title: 多车企交出 2 月销量成绩单
item.guid: 多车企交出-2-月销量成绩单
item.description:
Yesterday, major car manufacturers successively announced their sales data for February this year: 昨天，各大车企陆续公布了今年 2 月份销量数据：

    Nio: Delivered 20,797 new vehicles, a year-on-year increase of 57.6%; the new ES8 completed the delivery of 11,260 new vehicles in February;

    Xpeng: Delivered 15,256 vehicles;

    Li Auto: Delivered 26,421 vehicles;

    Leapmotor: Delivered 28,067 vehicles; the new A10 is about to start pre-sales;

    Xiaomi: Delivered over 20,000 vehicles; founder Lei Jun stated that the main model currently on sale is the YU7, while the new generation SU7 is being prepared intensively;

    Geely Group: Total sales of 206,100 vehicles. Among them, Geely brand sales were 154,900 vehicles, Galaxy brand was 73,100 vehicles; Lynk & Co sold 27,300 vehicles, Zeekr sold 23,867 vehicles;

    SAIC Group: Total vehicle sales of 269,465 units, new energy vehicle sales of 71,340 units;

    Great Wall: New energy vehicle sales of 12,744 units;

    Jishi: Delivered 1,298 vehicles;

    BAIC BluePark: Subsidiary sales of 7,364 vehicles, a year-on-year increase of 18.26%.

item.title: 荣耀机器人手机亮相
item.guid: 荣耀机器人手机亮相
item.description:
Yesterday, the Robot Phone, a robotic smartphone created by Honor, made a stunning debut at the 2026 Mobile World Congress (MWC). 昨日，由荣耀打造的机器人手机 Robot Phone 在 2026 世界移动通信大会（MWC）上惊艳亮相。

It is reported that the Honor Robot Phone is equipped with industry-leading miniature motors and a gimbal system. By combining the robot's flexible "body" with Honor's AI intelligent "brain," the Robot Phone exhibits multi-modal interactive capabilities full of vitality. 据悉，荣耀 Robot Phone 搭载着行业领先的微型电机和云台系统，通过将机器人灵活的「身体」与荣耀 AI 智能体「大脑」结合，Robot Phone 呈现出充满生命感的多模态交互能力。

With the empowerment of embodied AI, the Robot Phone can bring users a full-scenario interactive experience, and possesses rich emotional body language, rhythmic movement patterns, and more. 在具身智能的加持下，Robot Phone 能够为用户带来全场景的交互体验，并且拥有丰富的情绪化肢体语言、节奏律动模式等。

To achieve the ultimate embodied intelligent imaging experience, Honor has equipped the Robot Phone with a three-axis mechanical anti-shake gimbal camera and a 200-megapixel sensor, supporting intelligent 90° and 180° rotating camera movements. 同时为了实现极致的具身智能影像体验，荣耀为 Robot Phone 搭载了三轴机械防抖云台摄像头和 2 亿像素传感器，并且支持实现了 90° 和 180° 智能旋转运镜。

Also unveiled at MWC was Honor's first embodied intelligent humanoid robot, marking Honor as the world's first mobile phone company to enter the consumer market for humanoid robots. 此次一同亮相 MWC 的，还有荣耀的第一款具身智能人形机器人，标志着荣耀成为全球首家入局消费市场人形机器人的手机公司。

In addition to user data sharing, Honor will achieve intelligent service sharing and AI ecosystem collaboration between mobile phones and robots, ushering in a new era of "human-machine-environment" symbiosis, extending intelligent services from "fingertips" to "by your side." 除了用户数据共享，荣耀将在手机和机器人之间实现智慧服务共享和 AI 生态协同，开启一个「人-机-环」共生的新时代，让智能服务从「指尖」延伸至「身边」

Furthermore, Honor also announced a strategic technical cooperation with ARRI, a globally renowned imaging equipment brand. The two parties will work together to bring cinematic narrative expression experiences to creators worldwide. 另外，荣耀还与享誉全球的影像设备品牌阿莱（ARRI）宣布将展开战略技术合作，双方将携手为全球创作者带来电影级叙事表达体验。

It is reported that a series of cooperation achievements between Honor and ARRI in the imaging field will first be implemented on the Honor Robot Phone. 据悉，荣耀和阿莱在影像领域的一系列合作成果，将在荣耀机器人手机 Robot Phone 上率先落地。

This strategic technical cooperation also marks the first time ARRI's core imaging science technology has been directly integrated with consumer-grade mobile phone terminals, signifying that ARRI's color science, cinematic vision, and professional production workflows will officially be incorporated into consumers' mobile terminal experiences. 此次战略技术合作也是阿莱影像科学的核心技术第一次与消费级手机终端直接融合，标志着阿莱的色彩科学、电影视觉和专业制作流程将正式融入到消费者的移动终端体验之中。

item.title: 松延动力完成 B 轮融资 10 亿
item.guid: 松延动力完成-B-轮融资-10-亿
item.description:
Just now, Songyan Power announced: 刚刚，松延动力宣布：

On March 2nd, Beijing Songyan Power Technology Group Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "Songyan Power") announced the completion of its Series B financing round. This round of financing was led by Chen Dao Capital, an industrial investment platform of CATL, with follow-on investments from well-known institutions such as Guoke Investment, Jingguosheng Fund, and Jiuhe Ventures. The cumulative scale of Series B financing is nearly 1 billion yuan.

According to Songyan Power, this financing round brings together the core strengths of industrial capital, state-owned capital, and market-oriented venture capital institutions. It not only injects capital momentum for Songyan Power to deeply cultivate household consumption scenarios and accelerate the industrialization of technology, but also marks the official transition of the humanoid robot industry from the technical verification stage to the commercial closed-loop stage, setting an industry benchmark for the penetration of the embodied AI industry into the mass consumer market. 据松延动力介绍，此次融资集结产业资本、国有资本、市场化创投机构的核心力量，不仅为松延动力深耕家庭消费场景、加速技术产业化落地注入资本动能，更标志着人形机器人行业正式从技术验证阶段迈入商业化闭环的阶段，为具身智能产业向大众消费市场渗透树立行业标杆。

Currently, Songyan Power has cumulatively completed 9 rounds of financing. 目前，松延动力已累计完成了 9 轮融资。

It is worth mentioning that Songyan Power's robots participated in the skit "Grandma's Favorite" at this year's Spring Festival Gala. Unexpectedly, the four Bumi robots from Songyan Power performed quite well in the language program, and the "Robot Cai Ming" created by Songyan Power also appeared at the end of the show. 值得一提的是，松延动力旗下机器人于今年春晚参与了小品《奶奶的最爱》。出人意料的是，松延动力的四个 Bumi 机器人加入语言节目的效果还算不错，而由松延动力打造的「机器人蔡明」也在节目结尾亮相。

item.title: 英伟达：5G 不够用，6G 须由 AI 驱动
item.guid: 英伟达：5G-不够用，6G-须由-AI-驱动
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Nvidia is forming alliances with multiple telecom operators to drive the transformation of 6G networks towards an open, software-defined, AI-driven architecture, in order to meet the network demands of the future "physical AI" era. 据彭博社报道，英伟达正与多家电信运营商结盟，推动 6G 网络向开放式、软件定义、由 AI 驱动的架构转型，以满足未来「物理 AI」时代的网络需求。

Nvidia stated yesterday at the communications industry conference in Barcelona that current 5G networks are primarily focused on connecting people and devices, making it difficult to support the real-time intelligent communication needs of a large number of machine terminals such as future robots and autonomous vehicles. 英伟达昨天在巴塞罗那通信行业大会表示，当前的 5G 网络主要面向人与设备的连接，难以支撑未来机器人、自动驾驶车辆等大量机器终端的实时智能通信需求。

Ronnie Vasishta, head of Nvidia's telecom business, pointed out that existing networks "are not ready for tomorrow's application scenarios." In the AI era, networks need to provide intelligence to machines, not just data to humans. 英伟达电信业务负责人 Ronnie Vasishta 指出，现有网络「并未为明天的应用场景做好准备」，在 AI 时代，网络需要向机器提供智能，而不仅是向人类提供数据。

Nvidia's partners in this collaboration include operators such as Nokia, SoftBank, and T-Mobile. They plan to build a 6G network based on a general computing platform, enabling wireless equipment to be controlled by updateable software and data traffic to be scheduled in real-time by AI. 英伟达此次联合的伙伴包括诺基亚、软银、T-Mobile 等运营商，计划构建基于通用计算平台的 6G 网络，使无线电设备由可更新的软件控制，数据流量由 AI 实时调度。

Nvidia believes that future networks need to achieve "hundreds of thousands of times" efficiency improvement because available spectrum is limited, while the communication demands of AI devices will grow exponentially. 英伟达认为，未来网络需要实现「数十万倍」效率提升，因为可用频谱有限，而 AI 设备的通信需求将呈指数级增长。

item.title: 华为发布新一代 AI 超算集群
item.guid: 华为发布新一代-AI-超算集群
item.description:
On February 28th, local time, Huawei officially unveiled its new generation AI supercomputing cluster Atlas 950 SuperPoD and multiple computing solutions globally at the 2026 Mobile World Congress (MWC). 当地时间 2 月 28 日，华为在 2026 年世界移动通信大会（MWC）上面向全球正式发布新一代 AI 超算集群 Atlas 950 SuperPoD 及多款计算解决方案。

According to official Huawei news, the Atlas 950 SuperPoD adopts a 'cluster+SuperPoD' architecture, equipped with a self-developed UnifiedBus interconnect protocol, enabling high-speed interconnection of up to 8192 NPU chips. 据华为官方消息，Atlas 950 SuperPoD 采用「集群+SuperPoD」架构，搭载自研 UnifiedBus 互联协议，将多达 8192 颗 NPU 芯片进行高速互联。

According to Nikkei Asia, the Atlas 950 SuperPoD's self-developed interconnect protocol directly benchmarks against Nvidia's NVLink, and the system features unified memory addressing capabilities. In its full configuration, it includes 128 computing cabinets and 32 communication cabinets, with a deployment area of approximately 1000 square meters. 另据《日经新闻》报道，Atlas 950 SuperPoD 自研的互联协议直接对标英伟达 NVLink，并且该系统具备统一内存寻址能力，满配状态下包含 128 个计算机柜与 32 个通信机柜，部署面积约 1000 平方米。

Insiders reveal that the core chips are manufactured by SMIC using an upgraded N+3 process node, and the entire system is expected to be officially released in the fourth quarter of 2026. 知情人士透露，核心芯片由中芯国际采用升级版 N+3 工艺节点代工，整套系统预计于 2026 年第四季度正式发售。

Huawei's Rotating Chairman Xu Zhijun previously stated that against the backdrop of single-chip performance being limited by advanced manufacturing equipment, Huawei achieves a computing power overtake through large-scale chip cluster integration. 华为轮值董事长徐直军此前表示，在单芯片性能受制于先进制造设备限制的背景下，华为通过大规模芯片集群整合来实现算力反超。

Official data shows that the Atlas 950 SuperPoD is equipped with 56.8 times the number of NPUs compared to Nvidia's NVL144 system, which is planned for release in the second half of 2026, and its overall computing power output can reach 6.7 times that of the latter. 官方数据显示，Atlas 950 SuperPoD 配备的 NPU 数量是英伟达计划于 2026 年下半年推出的 NVL144 系统的 56.8 倍，其整体算力输出可达后者的 6.7 倍。

item.title: 宗馥莉砍掉娃哈哈机器人业务
item.guid: 宗馥莉砍掉娃哈哈机器人业务
item.description:
According to reports from National Business Daily, recently, sources close to Hangzhou Wahaha Precision Machinery Co., Ltd. revealed that Wahaha Precision Machinery issued a dissolution announcement on February 24, 2026, and has now legally entered the dissolution process. 据每日经济新闻报道，近日，有接近杭州娃哈哈精密机械有限公司人士透露，娃哈哈精机于 2026 年 2 月 24 日发布解散公示，现已依法进入解散程序。

Concurrently, materials provided show that some Wahaha Precision Machinery employees received a 'Notice of Termination of Labor Contract,' and their employment contracts with Wahaha Precision Machinery were terminated on February 28. 同时，其提供的材料显示，有娃哈哈精机员工收到了《终止劳动合同通知书》，员工与娃哈哈精机的劳动合同于 2 月 28 日终止。

The report states that a search of the National Enterprise Credit Information Publicity System revealed that Wahaha Precision Machinery has indeed issued a dissolution announcement and is currently undergoing a creditor's notice. 报道称，通过查询国家企业信用信息公示系统发现，娃哈哈精机的确已发布解散公示，并显示该企业正在进行债权人公告。

The cancellation announcement stated that the reason for cancellation was a resolution to dissolve, and the head of the liquidation group is Yan Xuefeng. According to previous media disclosures, Yan Xuefeng is a core executive of Zong Fuli's Hongsheng Group. 其中注销公告中声明注销原因为决议解散，清算组负责人为严学峰，据此前媒体披露，严学峰为宗馥莉宏胜系核心高管。

It is reported that Wahaha Precision Machinery is 100% owned by Wahaha Commercial Co., Ltd. After penetrating the equity structure, the ultimate controlling person of Wahaha Precision Machinery is Zong Fuli; Wahaha Precision Machinery Co. was established in 2011. 据悉，娃哈哈精机由娃哈哈商业股份有限公司 100% 持股，而穿透股权关系后，娃哈哈精机最终的实控人为宗馥莉；娃哈哈精机公司成立于 2011 年。

Sources close to Wahaha analyze that, unlike Zong Qinghou's diversified layout strategy, Zong Fuli's decision to cancel the precision machinery company might be out of consideration for focusing on the core food and beverage business. 有接近娃哈哈人士分析认为，和宗庆后多元化布局的思路不同，宗馥莉注销精机公司，或许是出于聚焦食品饮料主业的考虑。

item.title: 消息称华为已在手机部署 10GB 大小的端侧模型
item.guid: 消息称华为已在手机部署-10GB-大小的端侧模型
item.description:
Recently, Huawei HarmonyOS 6.0.0.328 Pollen Beta recruitment officially began, supporting models including Mate80/70/X7/X6 series, Pura80/X, MatePad Pro 13.2-inch 2025, and others. 近期，华为 HarmonyOS 6.0.0.328 花粉 Beta 版招募正式开启，支持机型包含 Mate80/70/X7/X6 系列、Pura80/X、MatePad Pro 13.2 英寸 2025 等。

According to blogger 'Adak Fenlangjuxu,' all pushes this time are full packages, with the largest ROM models exceeding 18GB, of which the on-device models account for approximately 10GB. 而据博主「Adak 封狼居胥」消息，本次推送的均为全量包，ROM 最大机型可达 18G B 以上，其中端侧模型大约占 10GB 左右。

At the same time, the earlier a model was launched, the smaller its on-device model, and the overall ROM package size decreases accordingly. However, the blogger emphasized that the actual functional differences will not be as significant as the perceived package size differences; most of it is due to variations in the size of on-device models deployed based on chip power efficiency. 同时，越早期推出的机型端侧模型越小，整体 ROM 包大小相应减小。但博主强调，实际功能差异不会有看到的包大小差异那么大，绝大部分都是依据芯片能耗比部署的端侧模型大小的差异。

Adak Fenlangjuxu also cited the latest data released by CounterPoint, stating that by the end of 2025, Huawei phones ranked first globally with an average memory of 12GB. The blogger pointed out that in the AI era, various companies are gradually increasing the average memory of their phones to meet the deployment needs of on-device algorithms and models. Adak 封狼居胥还援引了机构 CounterPoint 最新公布的数据，截止 2025 年底，华为手机以 12GB 的平均内存位居世界第一。博主指出，AI 时代各家都在逐渐提高旗下手机的平均内存，以满足端侧算法、模型的部署需要。

item.title: 三星宣布 2030 年全面迈向「AI 工厂」，Agentic AI 将成核心驱动力
item.guid: 三星宣布-2030-年全面迈向「AI-工厂」，Agentic-AI-将成核心驱动力
item.description:
Yesterday, Samsung Electronics announced that it would fully upgrade its global manufacturing system to 'AI Factories' by 2030, establishing Agentic AI as the core driving force. 昨天，三星电子宣布将在 2030 年前把全球制造体系全面升级为「AI 工厂」，并将 Agentic AI（智能体 AI）确立为核心驱动力。

Samsung stated that in the future, all manufacturing stages—from raw material entry, production scheduling, quality inspection, to final shipment—will be deeply involved and autonomized by AI. 三星表示，未来所有制造环节——从原材料入厂、生产调度、质量检测到最终出货——都将由 AI 深度参与并实现自治化。

The company will deploy digital twin simulation systems in global factories and introduce AI agents specifically for quality, production, and logistics to enhance predictive capabilities, process optimization efficiency, and overall production consistency. 公司将在全球工厂部署数字孪生模拟系统，并引入专门面向质量、生产与物流的 AI 智能体，以提升预测能力、流程优化效率与整体生产一致性。

In terms of safety and environmental management, the company plans to deploy environmental safety robots combined with digital twins in high-risk or human-inaccessible environments to achieve real-time monitoring and hazard elimination. 在安全与环境管理方面，公司计划在高风险或人类难以进入的环境中部署结合数字孪生的环境安全机器人，以实现实时监测与隐患消除。

Samsung emphasized that the core of this transformation is its Agentic AI technology, first introduced in the Galaxy S26 series. This technology can autonomously plan, execute, and optimize decisions, and Samsung is extending it from mobile devices to manufacturing, building an industrial-grade agent system with on-site autonomous capabilities. 三星强调，推动这一转型的核心是其在 Galaxy S26 系列上首次推出的 Agentic AI 技术。该技术能够自主规划、执行与优化决策，三星正将其从移动端扩展至制造端，构建具备现场自治能力的工业级智能体体系。

In the future, Samsung will gradually introduce various types of robots on its production lines, including operational robots responsible for production line operations and facility management, logistics robots for material transportation, and assembly robots for precision manufacturing. 未来，三星将在生产线上逐步引入多类型机器人，包括负责生产线操作与设施管理的操作机器人、负责物料运输的物流机器人，以及用于精密制造的装配机器人。

item.title: 美国电动汽车寒冬，Lucid 裁员 12%
item.guid: 美国电动汽车寒冬，Lucid-裁员-12%
item.description:
According to Business Insider, U.S. automaker Lucid has announced a layoff of approximately 12% of its workforce in the United States. 据《商业内幕》报道，美国车企 Lucid 已宣布在美国裁员约 12%。

According to an internal email sent to employees by interim CEO Marc Winterhoff, this round of layoffs does not affect hourly positions such as manufacturing, logistics, and quality. Its main purpose is to improve organizational efficiency, optimize resource allocation, and drive the company towards profitability. 根据临时 CEO Marc Winterhoff 发给员工的内部邮件，这轮裁员不涉及制造、物流与质量等小时工岗位，主要目的是提升组织效率、优化资源配置，并推动公司向盈利路径迈进。

Winterhoff stated in the email that the company will continue to focus on its established strategies, including preparation for mass production of its mid-size platform, expansion into the Robotaxi market, ADAS and software development, and sales growth of the Gravity and Air series in global markets. Winterhoff 在邮件中表示，公司将继续聚焦既定战略，包括中型平台的量产准备、Robotaxi 市场拓展、ADAS 与软件开发，以及 Gravity 与 Air 系列在全球市场的销售增长。

The U.S. electric vehicle market saw a significant decline in demand after the federal $7,500 tax credit ended last year, leading several automakers to scale back their EV plans. 美国电动车市场在去年联邦 7,500 美元税收抵免结束后需求明显下滑，多家车企缩减电动车计划。

Despite this, Lucid doubled its sales last year thanks to the production ramp-up of its Gravity SUV, but the company remains in a state of high losses. Its most recent financial report showed a net loss of nearly $1 billion, and the Q4 earnings report is expected to be released next week. 尽管如此，Lucid 去年凭借 Gravity SUV 的产能爬坡实现销量翻倍，但公司仍处于高额亏损状态，最近一次财报显示净亏损接近 10 亿美元，Q4 财报预计将在下周公布。

item.title: OpenAI 员工因内幕交易被解雇
item.guid: OpenAI-员工因内幕交易被解雇
item.description:
According to Wired, an OpenAI employee was officially fired for allegedly using internal confidential information for insider trading in prediction markets. 据 Wired 报道，OpenAI 一名员工因涉嫌利用内部机密信息在预测市场进行内幕交易，而被正式解雇。

The report states that Fidji Simo, CEO of OpenAI's consumer business, disclosed the dismissal decision to employees in earlier internal communications. 报道称，OpenAI 应用业务 CEO Fidji Simo 在早前的内部信息中向员工披露了此次解聘决定。

OpenAI spokesperson Kayla Wood later confirmed the news, emphasizing that company policy strictly prohibits employees from using internal confidential information for personal gain in prediction markets or other channels, but officials declined to disclose the identity of the employee involved or specific transaction details. OpenAI 发言人 Kayla Wood 随后证实了该消息，强调公司政策严格禁止员工利用内部机密信息在预测市场等渠道谋取个人私利，但官方拒绝透露涉事员工的身份及具体交易细节。

Analysis from financial data platform Unusual Whales indicates that this dismissal is not an isolated incident. Since March 2023, significant clusters of unusual trading have appeared on Polymarket surrounding major events such as the release dates of Sora and GPT-5, and the retention crisis of CEO Sam Altman. 据金融数据平台 Unusual Whales 的分析指出，此次解雇并非孤立事件。自 2023 年 3 月以来，围绕 Sora、GPT-5 的发布日期以及 CEO Sam Altman 的留任危机等重大事件，Polymarket 上出现了明显的异常交易聚集。

The agency, considering factors such as account age and trading history, flagged 77 positions across 60 cryptocurrency wallet addresses as suspected insider trading. For example, 40 hours before the release of the ChatGPT browser, 13 new wallets with no prior history suddenly appeared, collectively placing precise bets totaling $309,486. 该机构综合账户账龄、交易历史等因素，将 60 个加密钱包地址中的 77 个头寸标记为疑似内幕交易。例如，在 ChatGPT 浏览器发布前 40 小时，共有 13 个毫无历史记录的新钱包突然涌入，累计精准押注 309,486 美元。

item.title: 鲁宾天文台自动预警系统上线，首夜即发出 80 万条警报
item.guid: 鲁宾天文台自动预警系统上线，首夜即发出-80-万条警报
item.description:
According to The Verge, the Vera C. Rubin Observatory's automated alert system recently officially launched, beginning its mission to broadcast real-time anomalies in the night sky to astronomers worldwide. 据 The Verge 报道，日前，薇拉·鲁宾天文台（Vera C. Rubin Observatory）的自动化警报系统正式上线，开启了向全球天文学家实时播报夜空异动的任务。

On its first night of operation, the system issued 800,000 alerts, covering events such as asteroid flybys, supernova explosions, and black hole consumption events. 在上线运行的第一个晚上，该系统就发出了 80 万条预警，内容涵盖了小行星掠过、超新星爆发以及黑洞吞噬事件。

The observatory is equipped with a car-sized LSST survey camera, capturing approximately 1,000 high-resolution images each night and automatically filtering out subtle celestial changes imperceptible to the naked eye using algorithms. 该天文台配备了一台汽车大小的 LSST 巡天相机，每晚捕捉约 1000 张高分辨率图像，并通过算法自动筛选出肉眼难以察觉的星空变化。

As the observatory enters full operation, the number of alerts issued by this system is expected to climb to millions each night, and researchers may even need to use specific conditions to filter them to avoid being 'overwhelmed' by data. 随着天文台进入满负荷运转，这项系统预计每晚发出的警报数量将攀升至数百万条，研究人员甚至需要借助特定条件来过滤，以避免被数据「淹没」。

item.title: 理想 MEGA 不做增程的原因：车头太短
item.guid: 理想-MEGA-不做增程的原因：车头太短
item.description:
Recently, Tang Jing, head of Ideal Auto's product line, posted to confirm that there are no plans for a range extender for MEGA. 近期，理想汽车产品线负责人汤靖发文确认，MEGA 有没有增程的计划。

Tang Jing stated that MEGA is built on a pure electric architecture, so the front end only has a very short, necessary crumple zone for collision, and all available space is reserved for the cabin. 汤靖表示，MEGA 基于纯电架构打造，因此车头部分只留下了极短的、必要的碰撞溃缩空间，并把可用空间都留给了舱内。

He also emphasized that although the MEGA has a very short front end, it is the first model to receive the 3G+ highest collision safety rating from C-NCAP. 其也强调，虽然 MEGA 车头极短，但该车型是中保研第一台获得 3G+ 最高碰撞安全评级的车型。

At the same time, Tang Jing also stated that if a range extender were added, the front end would have to be lengthened, 'then MEGA would no longer be MEGA'. 同时汤靖也表示，如果要加个增程器，车头就得加长，「那 MEGA 就不是 MEGA 了」。

item.title: 💡 亚马逊 AI 主管：自研芯片是赢得 AI 竞赛的关键
item.guid: 💡-亚马逊-AI-主管：自研芯片是赢得-AI-竞赛的关键
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, Amazon's new AI chief Peter DeSantis recently stated in an interview that self-developed chips will be Amazon's key path to breaking through in this year's AI race. 据《华尔街日报》报道，亚马逊新任 AI 主管 Peter DeSantis 近日在接受采访时表示，自研芯片将成为亚马逊在今年 AI 竞赛中突围的关键路径。

He emphasized that the core problem facing the current AI industry is cost, and Amazon hopes to significantly reduce costs in the training and inference stages by developing its own Trainium and Inferentia chips, thereby attracting enterprise customers with a more price-competitive approach. 他强调，当前 AI 行业面临的核心问题是成本，而亚马逊希望通过自研 Trainium 与 Inferentia 芯片，在训练与推理环节显著降低成本，从而以更具价格优势的方式吸引企业客户。

He believes that Amazon's long-term accumulation in infrastructure and chip design enables it to build large models at a lower cost and provide enterprise-grade AI services in a more cost-effective manner. 他认为，亚马逊在基础设施与芯片设计方面的长期积累，使其有能力以更低成本构建大模型，并以更具性价比的方式提供企业级 AI 服务。

Amazon states that Trainium and Inferentia can be about 50% cheaper than competing products and can provide higher efficiency on specific tasks. Some enterprise customers, such as pharmaceutical research and development company Nimbus Therapeutics, have already found advantages in the Nova model's cost and training speed during testing. 亚马逊称，Trainium 与 Inferentia 相比竞品可便宜约 50%，并能在特定任务上提供更高效率。部分企业客户，如药物研发公司 Nimbus Therapeutics，已在测试中发现 Nova 模型在成本与训练速度上具备优势。

DeSantis believes that AI will be Amazon's long-term strategic focus in the next phase, and self-developed chips and a low-cost approach will be key for the company to regain its competitive edge. DeSantis 认为，AI 将是亚马逊下一阶段的长期战略重点，而自研芯片与低成本路线将是公司重回竞争前列的关键。

item.title: 荣耀 Magic V6 2026 MWC 全球首发
item.guid: 荣耀-Magic-V6-2026-MWC-全球首发
item.description:
Global tech brand Honor officially launched its new lightweight foldable flagship, the Honor Magic V6, at the MWC World Mobile Congress. 全球科技品牌荣耀于 MWC 世界移动通信大会上，正式发布了轻薄折叠屏旗舰新品荣耀 Magic V6。

Based on cross-generational leading technology, the Honor Magic V6 creates a true foldable flagship experience that combines extreme lightness, ultra-long battery life, reliability comparable to a bar phone, full performance, all-round AI capabilities, and flagship imaging prowess. 基于跨代领先的技术，荣耀 Magic V6 打造了兼具极致轻薄、超大电池续航、媲美直板机的可靠性、满血性能、全能 AI 能力，以及旗舰影像实力的折叠屏真旗舰体验。

With an ultra-thin body of 8.75mm in its folded state, the Honor Magic V6 once again sets a new record for lightweight foldable screens in the industry, marking the fourth time Honor has broken its own lightweight record within three years. The entire device weighs as little as 219g, offering a grip experience comparable to a flagship bar phone. 荣耀 Magic V6 以折叠状态 8.75mm 的极致轻薄机身，再次刷新行业轻薄折叠屏纪录，这也是荣耀三年内第四次打破自己保持的轻薄纪录。整机重量低至 219g，带来比肩直板旗舰的握持体验。

At the same time, while achieving extreme lightness, the Honor Magic V6 also made new breakthroughs in battery life. Equipped with the new generation Qinghai Lake battery technology, the silicon content has increased to 32%, leading foldable screen batteries into the 7000+mAh era. 与此同时，荣耀 Magic V6 在做到了极致轻薄的同时，续航能力也有了新突破。搭载的新一代青海湖电池技术，硅含量提升至 32%，引领折叠屏电池迈入 7000+mAh 时代。

In terms of core performance, the Honor Magic V6 is equipped with the full-blooded fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Extreme Edition chip, and its hinge uses aerospace-grade shield steel. It has also obtained multiple certifications, including drop resistance, bending resistance, and IP68&IP69 dust and water resistance. 核心性能方面，荣耀 Magic V6 搭载了满血第五代骁龙 8 至尊版芯，铰链采用了航天级盾构钢，还获得了包括抗跌落、耐弯折、IP68&IP69 防尘防水在内的多项认证。

item.title: 小米「徕卡手机」将在国内发售
item.guid: 小米「徕卡手机」将在国内发售
item.description:
Yesterday, Lu Weibing, President of Xiaomi Group, officially announced the new "black and silver" color scheme for the Xiaomi 17 Ultra Leica Edition. The design was personally crafted by the Leica team, and the overall appearance continues the Leica M series camera language. It will be officially released tonight at 18:30 during Lu Weibing's live broadcast. 昨天，小米集团总裁卢伟冰官宣小米 17 Ultra 徕卡版全新「黑银色」配色，设计由徕卡团队亲自操刀，整体外观延续徕卡 M 系列相机语言，将于今晚 18:30 卢伟冰直播中正式发布。

The new version features an integrated pure black back panel paired with a bright silver middle frame. The Leica "cola logo", the Leica text in the center of the lens module, and the Xiaomi Logo at the bottom are all arranged vertically, highly similar in appearance to the overseas version LEITZPHONE previously released in Barcelona, and is expected to be the domestic version of the latter. 新版本采用一体纯黑背板搭配亮银中框，徕卡「可乐标」、镜头模组中央的徕卡文字以及底部小米 Logo 均改为竖向排布，与此前在巴塞罗那发布的海外版 LEITZPHONE 外观高度相似，预计即为后者的国行版本。

It is worth noting that the LEITZPHONE is priced as high as 16,000 RMB overseas, and its domestic price has not yet been announced. 值得注意的是，LEITZPHONE 在海外的定价高达 1.6 万元人民币，国内售价尚未公布。

item.title: 26 款小鹏 X9 纯电版将于今日发布
item.guid: 26-款小鹏-X9-纯电版将于今日发布
item.description:
Xpeng will officially launch the 2026 X9 Pure Electric Edition today at 14:00. Let's take a look at the highlights of the new car: 小鹏将于今日 14:00 正式推出 2026 款 X9 纯电版，先来看看新车有哪些亮点：

    All models are equipped with Turing chips, with a maximum computing power of 2250TOPS, and feature Xpeng's second-generation VLA large model;

    All models come standard with zero-gravity second-row seats with airbags, supporting dual pre-tensioning and dual force-limiting seat belts, and featuring 9 airbags throughout the vehicle;

    Four range versions are available: 650/665/750/710 (four-wheel drive), using an 800V high-voltage platform and 5C supercharging battery;

    Standard intelligent dual-chamber air suspension and active rear-wheel steering (minimum turning radius 5.4m).

item.title: 5000 万像素潜望长焦加持，一加 15T 样张首秀
item.guid: 5000-万像素潜望长焦加持，一加-15T-样张首秀
item.description:
Recently, Wang Meng's studio posted real sample photos of the OnePlus 15T on Weibo. The watermark shows that the new phone will be equipped with a 50MP, 85mm focal length, F2.8 aperture periscope telephoto lens, supporting 3.5x optical zoom. The device is also expected to feature the LUMO Condensing Light Imaging System. 日前，王濛工作室在微博晒出一加 15T 实拍样张，其中水印显示新机将搭载 50MP、85mm 焦段、F2.8 光圈的潜望式长焦镜头，支持 3.5 倍光学变焦，该机预计还将配备 LUMO 凝光影像系统。

OnePlus official previously confirmed that the OnePlus 15T will officially debut in March this year, positioned as "the dream phone for small screen enthusiasts." According to MIIT network access information and revelations from several digital bloggers, the device features a 6.32-inch small straight screen and packs a large "7-series" battery into its compact body, with some sources claiming its capacity reaches 7500mAh. 一加官方此前已确认，一加 15T 将在今年 3 月正式亮相，定位为「小屏党的梦中情机」。根据工信部入网信息及多位数码博主的爆料，该机采用 6.32 英寸小尺寸直屏，并在紧凑机身中塞入「7 开头」的大电池，部分渠道称其容量达到 7500mAh。

In terms of appearance, according to online information, the OnePlus 15T features a pure white body and a horizontal large matrix camera module, with narrow bezels, and an overall simpler style. 外观方面，据网络信息显示，一加 15T 采用纯白机身与横向大矩阵摄像头模组，机身边框较窄，整体风格更趋简洁。

In terms of core configuration, the OnePlus 15T will be equipped with Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen5 flagship chip, and will support wireless charging, full-level waterproofing, and ultrasonic fingerprint recognition, while also coming standard with 100W wired fast charging. 核心配置上，一加 15T 将搭载高通骁龙 8 Elite Gen5 旗舰芯片，并支持无线充电、满级防水与超声波指纹识别，同时标配 100W 有线快充。

Li Jie, President of OnePlus China, stated that last year's OnePlus 13T already improved the battery life impression of small-screen phones with its large battery, and this year's OnePlus 15T will further reshape market perception of small-screen flagships, becoming the "Dream Phone" that small-screen users have been searching for for years. 一加中国区总裁李杰表示，去年的一加 13T 已凭借大电池改善了小屏机续航印象，而今年的一加 15T 将进一步重塑小屏旗舰的市场认知，成为小屏用户多年寻找的「Dream Phone」。

item.title: 时尚品牌 GUESS 3 月底关闭中国全部门店
item.guid: 时尚品牌-GUESS-3-月底关闭中国全部门店
item.description:
According to 21st Century Business Herald, American fast fashion brand GUESS plans to close all its online and offline stores in the Chinese market by the end of March, and the brand will temporarily withdraw from offline physical stores and direct e-commerce channels. 据 21 世纪经济报道消息，美国快时尚品牌 GUESS 计划于 3 月底前关闭其在中国市场的全部线上线下门店，品牌将暂时退出线下实体及电商直销渠道。

The report states that this store closure is part of GUESS Group's global business optimization. According to its parent company's first-quarter fiscal year 2026 financial report released last June, the group's adjusted net loss expanded to $22.3 million. 报道称，此次关店是 GUESS 集团全球业务优化的一部分。根据其母公司去年 6 月发布的 2026 财年第一季度财报，集团调整后净亏损扩大至 2230 万美元。

Among them, the Asian market performed weakly, with revenue decreasing by 20% year-on-year, and retail comparable sales (including e-commerce) plummeting by 24%, becoming the main drag. 其中亚洲市场表现疲弱，营收同比下降 20%，零售可比销售额（含电商）锐减 24%，成为主要拖累。

Group CEO Carlos Alberini once pointed out that in recent years, store and official website traffic in the US and Asian markets has continued to decline, and a similar trend is now appearing in Europe. The financial report shows that the Greater China business has been under long-term pressure, and the company has taken measures such as layoffs and store closures, and is seeking authorized partners to take over related businesses. 集团 CEO Carlos Alberini 曾指出，过去几年美国与亚洲市场的门店及官网客流持续下滑，如今欧洲也出现类似趋势。财报显示，大中华区业务长期承压，公司已采取裁员与关店措施，并寻求授权合作伙伴接管相关业务。

Despite closing direct sales channels, GUESS emphasized in a text message that it is "not withdrawing from the Chinese market," but will continue to cultivate it with a new model. 尽管关闭直销渠道，GUESS 在短信中强调「并非退出中国市场」，而是将以全新模式继续深耕。

item.title: adidas 推出 Audi Revolut F1 联名跑鞋
item.guid: adidas-推出-Audi-Revolut-F1-联名跑鞋
item.description:
According to Hypebeast, adidas and Audi Revolut Formula 1 Team have launched a new collaborative running shoe, the Adizero EVO SL "Chalk Pearl," which is now available in select regions worldwide. 据 Hypebeast 报道，adidas 与 Audi Revolut Formula 1 Team 推出全新联名跑鞋 Adizero EVO SL「Chalk Pearl」，并已在全球部分地区上架。

The shoe features a durable synthetic upper, emphasizing fit and stability, suitable for high-intensity training and daily wear. The overall color scheme is primarily Chalk Pearl, complemented by "Hi-Res Red" details, echoing the visual identity of Audi F1 race cars. 鞋款采用耐用合成材质鞋面，强调贴合与稳定性，适用于高强度训练与日常穿着。整体配色以 Chalk Pearl 为主，辅以「Hi-Res Red」细节，呼应 Audi F1 赛车的视觉识别。

The official suggested retail price is $166, and it is now available through select channels worldwide. 官方建议售价为 166 美元，现已在全球部分指定渠道发售。

item.title: MUJI BASE 新作落地京都，老建筑焕新与在地文化结合
item.guid: MUJI-BASE-新作落地京都，老建筑焕新与在地文化结合
item.description:
According to "Ideal Life Lab," the "MUJI BASE KYOTO kiyomizu" project has been officially announced. Located near Kiyomizu-zaka and the entrance to Kiyomizu-dera Temple in Kyoto, MUJI has taken over and renovated the Amenity Hotel Kyoto, an old inn that has been operating for over 40 years, with an official opening expected on May 20th. 据「理想生活实验室」报道，「MUJI BASE KYOTO kiyomizu」项目正式公布。该项目位于京都清水坂、清水寺入口附近，MUJI 接手并翻新了经营超过 40 年的老旅馆 Amenity Hotel 京都，预计将在 5 月 20 日正式开业。

MUJI has preserved the original building's exterior to maintain consistency with the local streetscape, while redesigning the interior in MUJI style. It offers a total of 18 guest rooms, ranging in size from 18.3 square meters to 53.3 square meters, covering various options such as king-size rooms, twin rooms (including bunk beds and sofa beds), rooms with bathtubs, and family rooms. MUJI 保留了原建筑外观，使其与当地街景保持一致，同时在内部以 MUJI 风格重新打造，共提供 18 间客房，面积从 18.3 平方米到 53.3 平方米不等，覆盖大床房、双床房（含上下铺与沙发床）、带浴缸房型以及家庭房等多种选择。

All rooms feature MUJI furniture and products, and incorporate works by local Kyoto artists. 房间均使用 MUJI 家具与产品，并加入京都本地艺术家的作品。

The project is currently open for bookings up to 6 months in advance, with the cheapest room type starting at 25,200 JPY per night (approximately 1100 RMB), and prices will fluctuate with peak and off-peak seasons. Check-in time is daily from 15:00 to 24:00, and check-out time is 10:00 the next day. 目前该项目已开放提前 6 个月预订，最便宜房型每晚 25200 日元（约人民币 1100 元），价格会随淡旺季浮动。入住时间为每日 15:00 至 24:00，退房时间为次日 10:00。

item.title: 2026 美国制片人工会奖获奖名单揭晓
item.guid: 2026-美国制片人工会奖获奖名单揭晓
item.description:
The winners of the 37th Producers Guild of America Awards (PGA Awards) have been officially announced, with "All Quiet on the Western Front" winning the Award for Best Theatrical Motion Picture. The list of winners, compiled by blogger "Watch Hollywood," is as follows: 第 37 届美国制片人工会奖（PGA Awards）获奖名单正式揭晓，《一战再战》夺得最佳院线剧情电影制片人奖。获奖名单由博主「守望好莱坞」整理如下：

  • Best Theatrical Motion Picture: "All Quiet on the Western Front" 最佳院线剧情电影制片人：《一战再战》
  • Best Theatrical Animated Motion Picture: "K-Pop: Demon Hunters" 最佳院线动画电影制片人：《K-Pop：猎魔女团》
  • Best Documentary Motion Picture: "My Mom, Jane" 最佳纪录电影制片人：《我的妈妈，简》
  • Best Episodic Drama: "Pittsburgh Medics" 最佳剧情类剧集制作人：《匹兹堡医护前线》
  • Best Episodic Comedy: "Studio Wars" 最佳喜剧类剧集制作人：《片厂风云》

    • Best Limited/Anthology Series Producer: "The Chaotic Youth"

    Best Television/Streaming Movie Producer: "John Candy: I Like Me"

    Best Nonfiction Television Program Producer: "The Clown Is Himself"

    Best Live Entertainment, Variety, Sketch, Stand-Up, and Talk Show Television Program: "The Late Show with Stephen Colbert"

    Best Game & Competition Television Program Producer: "The Traitors (US Version)"

item.title: 《暗黑新娘！》发布预告，3 月 6 日同步北美上映
item.guid: 《暗黑新娘！》发布预告，3-月-6-日同步北美上映
item.description:
<Insert Video ID: Warner Bros. Pictures> <插入视频号：华纳兄弟电影>

Yesterday, the film "Dark Bride!" released its official trailer and announced that it will be released on March 6. 昨天，影片《暗黑新娘！》发布正式预告，并官宣将于 3 月 6 日上映。

The trailer reveals the film's core premise: Frankenstein comes to 1930s Chicago, seeking the help of mad scientist Euphronius to create a companion for himself. 预告片展示了影片的核心设定：弗兰肯斯坦来到 1930 年代芝加哥，寻求疯狂科学家尤弗洛尼斯的帮助，为自己创造伴侣。

The two bring a murdered young woman back to life, but the "bride's" power and will far exceed expectations, leading to a complex emotional entanglement, police involvement, and a radical social movement. 两人让一名被谋杀的年轻女子重获新生，但这位「新娘」的力量与意志远超预期，引发一段复杂的情感纠葛、警方介入以及一场激进的社会运动。

早报
